description: Component for monitoring a Google Cloud Storage bucket prefix for new objects.

bucket_name.label: Bucket Name
bucket_name.description: Name of the GCS bucket to monitor

blob_pattern.label: Blob Pattern
blob_pattern.description: Regex pattern to match object names relative to the prefix (e.g.,

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when objects are detected

project.label: Project
project.description: GCP project ID. Uses the project from ADC if not set.

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing a pre-configured client.

partition_mode.label: Partition Mode
partition_mode.description: How detected GCS objects are surfaced. 'run_config' (default), 'dynamic_partition' (registers each new blob name as a dynamic partition), or 'both'. Pair with file_ingestion's matching input mode.

partition_key_template.label: Partition Key Template
partition_key_template.description: Template for the partition key. Fields: {bucket}, {name}, {prefix}. Default {name} is the bare blob name.

name: GCS Monitor
